title: lupinus lyallii subsp. lyallii
intro: Lupinus lyallii subsp. lyallii, also known as the Lyall's lupin, is a perennial herb native to New Zealand, belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic qualities. The plant is known to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Lupinus lyallii subsp. lyallii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to address a range of health concerns and promote overall well-being.
